description: Schema for creating a new gym membership member

important: billingOwnerMemberId is the single source of truth for who pays
expectingRecovering object is only valid when: gender == FEMALE AND membershipType == EXPECTING_RECOVERING
family object is only populated when membershipType == FULL_FAMILY

membership.note: EXPIRED status is system-generated when contract ends without renewal

contract.earlyCancellationFeeDollars: number — max(100, 2 × published monthly rate for membership type)
contract.note: pauseUsed is a boolean that enforces maxPausesPerContract: 1. Once set to true, cannot be reset until contract renewal

group.note: discountActive is derived, not user-controlled. discountPercent, minMembersForDiscount, and discountEffectiveTiming values come from membership-rules.json groupRules

pause.note: pauseEffectiveTiming, chargeDuringPause, and pausedCountsAsActive values come from membership-rules.json pauseRules

cancellation.note: cancellationEffectiveTiming and cancellationFeeChargeTiming values come from membership-rules.json contractRules

billingStatus.note: gracePeriodDays and lateFee values come from membership-rules.json paymentRules

acknowledgements.membershipContractTermsAcceptedAt: ISO_TIMESTAMP | null — contract dates, early cancellation fee, one free pause
